projectDescription: A declarative, stow-based dotfiles setup for CachyOS/Arch Linux featuring the niri Wayland compositor, DMS shell, a custom package manager wrapper (pkg), and a terminal screensaver.
keyFeatures: GNU Stow-based dotfile symlink management across multiple profiles (base, niri, pkg, screensaver)
pkg: single-file declarative package manager wrapping pacman, paru, flatpak, and uv with TOML config
Niri tiling Wayland compositor with modular KDL config split across animation, input, keybinds, layout, rules
DMS (DankMaterialShell) integration for app launcher, clipboard, notifications, power menu, and lock screen
Terminal screensaver using terminaltexteffects (tte) with dynamic refresh-rate detection and focus-aware exit
Automatic backend bootstrapping — paru is installed via pacman on CachyOS or built from AUR on stock Arch
Lifecycle hooks (before-sync, after-sync, before/after-{backend}) run on every pkg sync
Modular bashrc via ~/.bashrc.d/ with starship prompt, mise runtime manager, fzf integrations, and rbw SSH agent
publicApiSurface: screensaver (binary — launches terminal screensaver via foot)
